inputs.label: AGV Purchase Cost (per unit)
inputs.businessContext: Initial investment cost for an AGV unit. Based on industry benchmarks from material handling equipment suppliers.

inputs.label: Number of AGVs
inputs.businessContext: Total number of AGVs deployed. Determines total investment and maintenance costs.

inputs.label: Annual Operating Hours per AGV
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual usage hours per AGV. Based on typical shift patterns (e.g., 2 shifts x 2000 hours).

inputs.label: Manual Labor Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage of a manual material handler including benefits. Based on industry wage surveys.

inputs.label: Manual Workers Replaced per AGV
inputs.businessContext: Number of manual workers that can be replaced by one AGV. Typically 1-2 workers per AGV depending on task complexity.

inputs.label: AGV Maintenance Cost per Operating Hour
inputs.businessContext: Hourly maintenance cost including parts and labor. Based on AGV manufacturer recommendations and industry data.

inputs.label: AGV Energy Cost per Operating Hour
inputs.businessContext: Electricity cost for charging AGVs. Based on average industrial electricity rates and AGV power consumption.

inputs.label: AGV Lifespan (Years)
inputs.businessContext: Expected useful life of an AGV. Based on industry standards (typically 5-10 years).

inputs.label: Discount Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Weighted average cost of capital (WACC) or required rate of return. Based on corporate finance standards.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Affects risk adjustment in ROI calculations.

thresholds.paybackPeriodYears: > 5 -> 'Payback period exceeds 5 years; consider reducing costs or increasing utilization.'
thresholds.roiPercent: < 15 -> 'ROI below 15%; investment may not meet hurdle rate.'

hiddenLossDrivers: if paybackPeriodYears > 5 then 'Payback period exceeds 5 years; consider reducing costs or increasing utilization.'
if roiPercent < 15 then 'ROI below 15%; investment may not meet hurdle rate.'
suggestedActions: Increase AGV utilization (more operating hours) to improve payback.
Negotiate lower AGV purchase cost or consider leasing options.
Optimize maintenance schedule to reduce hourly maintenance cost.
Evaluate energy-efficient AGV models to lower energy cost.
